news.title: For the first time, retail top category for loan write-offs by Indian banks in FY25
news.india_relevance: Signals a significant shift in Indian banking stress from corporate to individual borrowers.
news.why_it_matters:
Retail loans overtaking corporate debt in write-offs suggests rising household leverage and potential systemic risk in consumer credit.
It marks the end of a decade where corporate NPAs were the primary concern for Indian lenders.

news.title: India eases FDI rules, allows firms with up to 10% Chinese shareholding under automatic route
news.india_relevance: A major pivot in India's investment policy regarding capital from land-border sharing countries.
news.why_it_matters:
Relaxing the Press Note 3 restrictions could unlock stalled venture capital and manufacturing investments.
It balances national security concerns with the pragmatic need for global supply chain integration.

news.title: The great Indian bank CEO shortage: A problem unique to private lenders
news.india_relevance: Highlights a critical leadership and governance gap in India's systemic private banking sector.
news.why_it_matters:
Succession planning failures at major banks create institutional instability and regulatory friction.
This talent crunch could slow down strategic transitions in a rapidly digitizing financial landscape.

news.title: West Asia war: Specialty fertiliser imports 10-20% costlier, cos to step up production
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts Indian agricultural input costs and the domestic manufacturing mandate.
news.why_it_matters:
Rising import costs for specialty fertilisers threaten farmer margins and food security.
It forces a structural shift toward domestic production to mitigate geopolitical supply shocks.

news.title: RIL signs long-term $3 billion pact with South Korea’s Samsung C&T for supply of green ammonia
news.india_relevance: A massive bet by India's largest conglomerate on the future of the green hydrogen economy.
news.why_it_matters:
Securing long-term supply/purchase agreements is critical for making green energy projects bankable.
This positions Reliance as a global player in the emerging green ammonia trade corridor.

news.title: Govt flags competition oversight amid concerns over duopolies in key sectors
news.india_relevance: Reflects growing regulatory anxiety over market concentration in Indian aviation, telecom, and retail.
news.why_it_matters:
Duopolistic structures can stifle innovation and lead to higher prices for Indian consumers.
Increased CCI scrutiny could impact future M&A activity and pricing strategies of dominant players.

news.title: Top Indian IT firms face sharp market cap declines amid AI disruption
news.india_relevance: Examines the existential threat to India's $250 billion IT services export engine.
news.why_it_matters:
Generative AI is challenging the traditional linear 'man-hours' business model of Indian IT.
Companies must pivot from labor arbitrage to IP-led services to maintain global competitiveness.

news.title: India jobless rate dips to 4.9% in February as urban employment improves
news.india_relevance: A key macroeconomic indicator for Indian policymakers and consumer-facing businesses.
news.why_it_matters:
Improving urban employment suggests a recovery in formal sector hiring and urban consumption.
However, the quality of jobs and rural underemployment remain critical second-order concerns.

news.title: After funding slowdown, edtech sector heads for consolidation
news.india_relevance: Captures the post-pandemic reality of one of India's most venture-funded sectors.
news.why_it_matters:
The shift from growth-at-all-costs to profitability is forcing weaker players to merge or shut down.
Consolidation will likely lead to more sustainable business models but fewer choices for students.

news.title: SC issues notice to MeitY on PILs challenging DPDP Act

news.why_it_matters:
Judicial scrutiny could delay the implementation of rules or force amendments to the Act.

news.title: Bajaj Auto may shift EV expansion out of Maharashtra amid subsidy, permit row

news.why_it_matters:

rankings.title: Despite PNG meter connection, nearly 40% customers can't access piped gas
